title: GWSWEX: Groundwater-Vadose-Surface Water Exchange Model
description: GWSWEX is a field-scale, column-based vadose zone model for mass-conservative groundwater recharge and runoff computation. It features two interchangeable numerical solvers (explicit operator-split and implicit mixed-form Richards) behind a unified Python API, with a modern Fortran 2008 kernel and OpenMP parallelism.
